name: Albacore Vegetable Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan with a tight lid, combine the rice, chicken stock, water, lemon juice, dill, salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 20 minutes.
2. Stir in the vegetables (and thawed frozen vegetables if using), cover, and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes or until all the liquid is absorbed.
3. Blend in the sour cream and white tuna. Serve hot or cold.
